prompt: log in as standard_user with password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack to cart, go to checkout, fill in first name 'Test', last name 'User', postal code '12345', complete the order and verify the 'Thank you for your order' confirmation appears
summary: Verifies that a standard user can log in, add the Sauce Labs Backpack to their cart, complete the checkout flow with shipping details, and see the "Thank you for your order!" confirmation.
